typesense: image: 'typesense/typesense:27.1' ports: - '${FORWARD_TYPESENSE_PORT:-8108}:8108' environment: TYPESENSE_DATA_DIR: '${TYPESENSE_DATA_DIR:-/typesense-data}' TYPESENSE_API_KEY: '${TYPESENSE_API_KEY:-xyz}' TYPESENSE_ENABLE_CORS: '${TYPESENSE_ENABLE_CORS:-true}' volumes: - 'sail-typesense:/typesense-data' networks: - sail healthcheck: test: [CMD, bash, -c, "exec 3<>/dev/tcp/localhost/8108 && printf 'GET /health HTTP/1.1\\r\\nConnection: close\\r\\n\\r\\n' >&3 && head -n1 <&3 | grep '200' && exec 3>&-"] retries: 5 timeout: 7s
